style_effects: Flickering translucent purple mist particles drift slowly around Sandslash, elongating shadows bending unnaturally as they twist through the air. A cold, eerie violet aura pulses faintly around its body, casting distorted reflections in the still mist. The lighting mood is an ethereal, dim purple glow with subtle energy pulses visible through its translucent form. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
